Motion To Vacate Crc 225 Dismissal Of Included Action
Off Calendar May-01-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate CRC 225 Dismissal of Included Action is scheduled today. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Dismissal pursuant to CRC 225 entered in consolidated Case No. 324637 Center for Environmental Hlth. vs. Ultra Play, on 3/18/2003. Written sanction issued on 3/24/2003 is ordered set aside and vacated. Order signed. Proceedings reported by: Dave Davenport. (212)
